title: Modern Netty
description: fabric mod that adds experimental iouring and kqueue support
body:
## What does it do?

A fabric mod that switches your transportation-method in regards of networking to achieve faster results on certain systems.

For example: `MacOs/BSD => Kqueue` or `Linux => IoUring`

This can be used either way on a fabric client or server.

## Why should I use it?

If **you're** on **Windows** and neither on MacOs/BSD nor newer versions of Linux you don't have any benefits from downloading this mod.

## Why'd you upload such a mod on modrinth

I made this mod for myself sometime ago and now I maintain it whenever and however I want.
